zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn於1452年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾。她於大約1465年與Sir Thomas Baynham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1518年10月22日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn于1452年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾。她于大约1465年与Sir Thomas Baynham结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1518年10月22日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Walwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wal(d)wine, which is of ancient Germanic origin, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘friend’.

from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Walweyn, Walwain. The central French form of this name is Gawain (see Gavin ). This name is found in the medieval Arthurian romances and is traditionally explained as an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps meaning ‘hawk of the plain’.

variants.name: Gavin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gábháin or Ó Gáibhín, both of which are derived from diminutives of gábhadh ‘want’ or ‘danger’ (the second being the more likely meaning here).

Scottish and northern English: from the personal name Gavin, Scottish form of English Gawain and French Gauvain . The name was introduced into English from French versions of the Arthurian romances, where this name was borne by one of the knights of the Round Table, brother of Galahad and Mordred and a nephew of Arthur. It has been taken to be an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps ‘hawk of the plain’.
Scottish: shortened form of McGavin , which is believed to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gobhann ‘son of the smith’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn was born in 1452, in Gloucestershire, England. She married Sir Thomas Baynham about 1465. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 10 daughters. She died about 22 October 1518, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn est née en 1452, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Baynham environ 1465. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée environ 22 octobre 1518, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn wurde 1452 in Gloucestershire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1465 Sir Thomas Baynham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 10 Töchter. Sie starb um 22. Oktober 1518 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn è nata il nel 1452 nel Gloucestershire, England. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Baynham circa 1465. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 10 figlie. Morì circa 22 ottobre 1518, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwynは1452年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた。約1465年にSir Thomas Baynhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1518年10月22日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn(은)는 1452년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1465년 Sir Thomas Baynham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1518년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn nasceu em 1452, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Baynham aproximadamente 1465. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 22 de outubro de 1518, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Walwyn родилась в 1452 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Baynham около 1465 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 10 дочерей. Она умерла около 22 октября 1518 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
